Campaign.description: Aggregate root representing a marketing campaign and its lifecycle from drafting through publication.

fields.name: offerDetails
fields.description: The offer presented to the market

fields.name: termsAndConditions
fields.description: Legal terms and conditions for the offer

fields.name: legalApproved
fields.description: Whether legal requirements have been approved

fields.name: targetAudience
fields.description: The selected target segment for the campaign

fields.name: salesChannels
fields.description: Sales channels where the campaign is published

fields.name: publishedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the campaign was published

TargetAudience.description: Value object describing the selected target segment for a campaign; replaced as a whole when re-segmented.

fields.name: estimatedReach
fields.description: Estimated number of recipients in the segment

MarketingDispatch.description: Aggregate root for an outbound marketing send (SMS or email) to a targeted segment.

fields.name: dispatchedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the dispatch was sent

AdImpression.description: Aggregate root for a dynamically served campaign ad shown to a visitor on web or app.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the ad impression

fields.name: servedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the ad was served

fields.name: channel
fields.description: Channel the ad was served on

Lead.description: Aggregate root for a potential customer flagged from anonymous visitor behavior.

fields.name: behaviorPattern
fields.description: Behavior pattern that triggered lead identification

fields.name: identifiedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the lead was identified

MarketingMessage.description: Aggregate root tracking a delivered marketing message and its engagement (e.g. opened).

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the marketing message

fields.name: dispatchId
fields.description: Dispatch this message was part of

fields.name: openedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the message was opened

EngagementSession.description: Aggregate root for a visitor's session on a campaign landing page.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the engagement session

fields.name: campaignId
fields.description: Campaign associated with the landing page

fields.name: landingPageUrl
fields.description: URL of the campaign landing page

fields.name: referrer
fields.description: Referrer that led to the visit

OfferConfiguration.description: Aggregate root capturing the offer a visitor configures (data amount, device) before conversion.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the offer configuration

fields.name: sessionId
fields.description: Engagement session this configuration belongs to

fields.name: selectedDataAmount
fields.description: Data amount selected via the configurator

fields.name: monthlyPrice
fields.description: Computed monthly price for the configuration

fields.name: configuredAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last configurator interaction

CheckoutSession.description: Aggregate root for the checkout/cart created when a visitor converts on a configured offer.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the checkout session

fields.name: customerId
fields.description: Customer the checkout belongs to once known

fields.name: offerConfigurationId
fields.description: Offer configuration the cart was built from

fields.name: campaignTerms
fields.description: Campaign terms applied to the checkout

fields.name: initiatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the session was initiated

fields.name: visitorId
fields.description: Visitor who initiated the checkout via the call to action

fields.name: ctaLabel
fields.description: Label of the call-to-action button that initiated the checkout (conversion attribution)

CartItem.description: Line item within a checkout session capturing a product and its price.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the cart item

Customer.description: Aggregate root representing a customer account holder.

Subscription.description: Aggregate root representing a mobile subscription and its lifecycle (activation, upgrade, suspension).

fields.name: serviceOptions
fields.description: Add-on service options on the subscription

fields.name: customerGroupId
fields.description: Billing customer group the subscription belongs to

ServiceOption.description: Add-on service (roaming, streaming) attached to a subscription, with its own lifecycle.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the service option

CallDetailRecord.description: Aggregate root for a network usage record (CDR) from raw capture through finalization.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the call detail record

fields.name: volume
fields.description: Usage volume (seconds, MB, or count depending on session type)

fields.name: networkElementId
fields.description: Network element that produced the raw record

fields.name: status
fields.description: CDR status from raw to finalized

fields.name: recordedAt
fields.description: Timestamp the raw usage was recorded

fields.name: finalizedAt
fields.description: Timestamp the CDR was finalized and validated

UsageAllowance.description: Aggregate root tracking a subscription's data allowance consumption and thresholds.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the usage allowance

Charge.description: Aggregate root for a priced (rated) usage event.

PrepaidBalance.description: Aggregate root for a prepaid (kontantkort) customer's monetary balance.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the prepaid balance

BonusCredit.description: Aggregate root for bonus data or discount granted to a customer (e.g. loyalty).

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the bonus credit

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Bonus amount (MB for data, SEK for discount)

BillingCycle.description: Aggregate root for a billing period for a customer group.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the billing cycle

Invoice.description: Aggregate root for a customer invoice aggregating charges and recurring fees.

fields.name: billingCycleId
fields.description: Billing cycle the invoice belongs to

fields.name: dispatchChannel
fields.description: Channel the invoice was dispatched through

InvoiceLineItem.description: Line item on an invoice for a specific charge or recurring fee.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the invoice line item

fields.name: chargeType
fields.description: Type of charge for the line item

Payment.description: Aggregate root for a payment registered against an invoice.

Receivable.description: Aggregate root tracking an outstanding invoice from the accounts receivable perspective (settled/overdue).

CollectionCase.description: Aggregate root for a debt collection case handed to an external agency.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the collection case
